Sunkissed Poppy – Sweet and sunny floral with a spark of citrus. 👍🏻Best for morning showers, pre-workout, or beating a midweek slump. Romantic / Feminine ✨You’re in the mood to feel pretty, soft, and subtly sensual. Moroccan Rose – Elegant floral that lingers beautifully. Pink Hibiscus – Tropical and cheerful, yet delicate. Vanilla – Warm, comforting, with soft sweet depth. 👍🏻Ideal for date night prep or when you just want to feel extra special. Relaxed / Calm ✨You’re winding down, craving peace and quiet. Ocean Glow – Clean, spa-like freshness with light aquatic notes. Moonlight Glow – Subtle floral with a calm, cozy vibe. Desert Haze – Smooth, soft musk with a dreamy hint of floral. 👍🏻Perfect for evening showers or self-care routines before bed. Playful / Fun ✨Feeling light-hearted, playful, or nostalgic? Cotton Candy – Sweet and nostalgic like a carnival treat. Coco Colada – Creamy coconut and pineapple fun in the sun. Rainbow Sherbet – Fruity-fizzy citrus joy. 👍🏻Great for weekends, girls’ night, or anytime you want to feel bubbly. Grounded / Comforted ✨You’re seeking warmth, familiarity, and comfort. Vanilla – Cozy, soft sweetness like a warm hug. Desert Haze – A sensual but grounded floral-musk blend. Moonlight Glow – Calming and elegant with spa tranquility. 👍🏻Best for colder days, reflective moments, or a comforting routine. Benefit 💞Exfoliation - Removes dead skin cells for smoother texture and improved absorption of lotions. 💞Hydration Boost - Shea butter and oils lock in moisture for long-lasting softness. 💞Even Skin Tone - Regular use helps reduce dullness and uneven skin patches. 💞Improved Shave Prep - Leaves skin smooth and reduces ingrown hairs or razor bumps. 💞Glowing Finish - Enhances natural radiance and leaves a healthy glow after rinsing. 💞Relaxing Aromatherapy - Scents help boost mood, reduce stress, or energize depending on the variant. Directions: Apply A Generous Amount To Damp Or Dry Skin. Buff In Circular Motions For Even Coverage And Effective Exfoliation. Energized / Uplifting

✨You want to feel fresh, motivated, and ready to conquer the day.

Coconut Lime – Bright, citrusy zing to wake you up.

Watermelon – Juicy, vibrant, and playfully sweet.

Rainbow Sherbet – Zesty and fruity like a splash of sunshine.

Sunkissed Poppy – Sweet and sunny floral with a spark of citrus.

👍🏻Best for morning showers, pre-workout, or beating a midweek slump.

Romantic / Feminine

✨You’re in the mood to feel pretty, soft, and subtly sensual.

Moroccan Rose – Elegant floral that lingers beautifully.

Pink Hibiscus – Tropical and cheerful, yet delicate.

Vanilla – Warm, comforting, with soft sweet depth.

👍🏻Ideal for date night prep or when you just want to feel extra special.

Relaxed / Calm

✨You’re winding down, craving peace and quiet.

Ocean Glow – Clean, spa-like freshness with light aquatic notes.

Moonlight Glow – Subtle floral with a calm, cozy vibe.

Desert Haze – Smooth, soft musk with a dreamy hint of floral.

👍🏻Perfect for evening showers or self-care routines before bed.

Playful / Fun

✨Feeling light-hearted, playful, or nostalgic?

Cotton Candy – Sweet and nostalgic like a carnival treat.

Coco Colada – Creamy coconut and pineapple fun in the sun.

Rainbow Sherbet – Fruity-fizzy citrus joy.

👍🏻Great for weekends, girls’ night, or anytime you want to feel bubbly.

Grounded / Comforted

✨You’re seeking warmth, familiarity, and comfort.

Vanilla – Cozy, soft sweetness like a warm hug.

Desert Haze – A sensual but grounded floral-musk blend.

Moonlight Glow – Calming and elegant with spa tranquility.

👍🏻Best for colder days, reflective moments, or a comforting routine.

Benefit

💞Exfoliation - Removes dead skin cells for smoother texture and improved absorption of lotions.

💞Hydration Boost - Shea butter and oils lock in moisture for long-lasting softness.

💞Even Skin Tone - Regular use helps reduce dullness and uneven skin patches.

💞Improved Shave Prep - Leaves skin smooth and reduces ingrown hairs or razor bumps.

💞Glowing Finish - Enhances natural radiance and leaves a healthy glow after rinsing.

💞Relaxing Aromatherapy - Scents help boost mood, reduce stress, or energize depending on the variant.

Directions:

Apply A Generous Amount To Damp Or Dry Skin. Buff In Circular Motions For Even Coverage And Effective Exfoliation. Rinse Well.

L'Occitane Almond Exfoliating Body Scrub – 200ml

New Packaging – Smoothing & Nourishing – Authentic

Product Description

Experience the ultimate body scrub with L'Occitane Almond Exfoliating Body Scrub — a luxurious blend of almond butter, sweet almond oil, and finely crushed almond shells that gently exfoliates while deeply nourishing the skin.

Enriched with sweet almond oil from Provence — rich in omega 6 and 9 fatty acids — and almond butter, this rich paste buffs away dead skin cells and impurities, leaving your skin velvety soft, smooth, and radiant. Its creamy formula, enhanced with natural exfoliants, refines skin texture while providing deep hydration — all without any sticky residue.

The result? Skin that feels silky-smooth, deeply moisturized, and delicately fragranced with the irresistible, crunchy scent of fresh almonds.

How to Use

 
 
\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t

标题: Shinzui (Bundle of 2) Skin Lightening Body Scrub 200g
详情: [{"type": "text", "text": "Shinzuí Skin Lightening Body Scrub 200g is a body care product designed to exfoliate and lighten the skin. Product key features: Purpose: To exfoliate dead skin cells. To lighten the skin's appearance. To help fade pigmentation. To moisturize the skin. Key Ingredients and Benefits: Often contains \"Herba Matsu Oil,\" derived from Matsutake mushrooms, which is highlighted for its skin lightening properties. May contain Jojoba oil. Designed to aid in removing dead skin cells. Key Features: Provides physical exfoliation. Designed for use on the body. Available in 200g containers. How to Use: Use on dry ot wet skin Regular exfoliation is vital for the elimination of dead skin particles and the regeneration of the skin. Apply all over wet or dry skin and massage gently to remove dead skin cells and dirt. Rinse thoroughly and use twice a week for optimum results. Important considerations: As with any skin lightening product, results may vary. It is always prudent to check the ingredient list for potential allergens. Skin exfoliation can increase skins sensitivity to sunlight, so it is important to use sunscreen. ** To get the most accurate and up-to date information, it’s always recommended to check the product packaging or the manufacturer’s website."}]

"https://www.lazada.sg/shinzu'i-110140026/"}, "desc": "

Shinzuí Skin Lightening Body Scrub 200g is a body care product designed to exfoliate and lighten the skin.

Product key features:  

Purpose:

  • To exfoliate dead skin cells.  
  • To lighten the skin's appearance.  
  • To help fade pigmentation.  
  • To moisturize the skin.

Key Ingredients and Benefits:

  • Often contains \"Herba Matsu Oil,\" derived from Matsutake mushrooms, which is highlighted for its skin lightening properties.  
  • May contain Jojoba oil.  
  • Designed to aid in removing dead skin cells.

Key Features:

  • Provides physical exfoliation.  
  • Designed for use on the body.  
  • Available in 200g containers.  

How to Use:

  • Use on dry ot wet skin
  • Regular exfoliation is vital for the elimination of dead skin particles and the regeneration of the skin.  
  • Apply all over wet or dry skin and massage gently to remove dead skin cells and dirt.  
  • Rinse thoroughly and use twice a week for optimum results.

 

Important considerations:

  • As with any skin lightening product, results may vary.
  • It is always prudent to check the ingredient list for potential allergens.
  • Skin exfoliation can increase skins sensitivity to sunlight, so it is important to use sunscreen.  

** To get the most accurate and up-to date information, it’s always recommended to check the product packaging or the manufacturer’s website.

【Product Detail】

As your skin undergoes its own process of natural renewal, dead cells and other impurities accumulate and hide your skins freshest layer. Cosmo pink Lemon & Mandarin orange face and body scrub is a gentle exfoliating scrub that helps in tan removal.It’s unique deep exfoliating formula serves you, polish away little imperfections with a delicious, citrusy scrub infused with pink lemon and mandarin orange peel extract. Leaves your skin feeling soft, smooth and better prepared to absorb moisture, plus it’s scented with a fresh and delicate fruity fragrance that helps awaken and revive the senses.

【Cautions】

FOR EXTERNAL USE ONLY. AVOID CONTACT WITH EYES. DISCONTINUE USE IF SIGNS OF IRRITATION OR RASH APPEAR. KEEP OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN. REPLACE THE CAP AFTER USE.
